outputs: sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
The handbook denies having used that term.
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
warnings: The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
Where the command appears to answer a question not asked, attach the transcript to the nearest related form and do not ask the terminal to clarify itself.
